subject: You still have £3,200 of ISA allowance left to use
pre_header: Your tax year allowance ends on 5 April – top up today and make the most of your tax-efficient savings

blocks.text: You have £3,200 of ISA allowance left

blocks.html: The tax year ends at 23:59 on 5 April, and you've already used £16,800 of your £20,000 ISA allowance this year. That means you still have £3,200 available to invest tax-efficiently.
Any allowance you don't use will be lost – it doesn't carry forward to the next tax year. So if you'd like to make the most of your tax-free wrapper, now's the time to act.

blocks.text: Why top up your Stocks & Shares ISA?

blocks.html: When you invest in a Stocks & Shares ISA, any potential growth and income is shielded from UK Income Tax and Capital Gains Tax. The earlier you invest, the more time your money has to potentially grow.
Our team is here to help if you need guidance on how to top up or have any questions about your ISA. Just give us a call or visit our help centre online.

This information is not personal advice or a recommendation to invest. If you're unsure whether an investment is right for you, please seek advice. Tax rules can change and the benefits depend on your individual circumstances. The value of investments can fall as well as rise, so you could get back less than you invest.
